calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 501 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Tyrone Dotson.
Dept: 514. Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

John P. Zanghi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation.
Jessica Hickerson, General Director for plaintiff, was placed under oath and tesified.
No appearance by defendant Tyrone Dotson.
Plaintiff's complaint for unlawful detainer was filed on July 5, 2019.
Defendant Russell Smith filed his answer to plaintiff's complaint on July 11, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on August 7, 2019, setting trial for today, August 26, 2019.
DOE defendants dismissed today, August 26, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation, and against defendant Tyrone Dotson, as follows:

Holdover Damages - $533.60.
Costs - $315.00.

Total - $848.60.

Additionally, plaintiff is entitled to Restitution & Possession of the premises located at 3048 16th Street, Unite #406, San Francisco, CA.

The rental agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Charles Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Jessica Hickerson.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Tyrone Dotson is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of August 26, 2019 remains on calendar. (501)
